calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion discriminative pair (517c sentinel-emit fix)
items.note: Instrumentation-only re-queue of V3-EXQ-517c, which ran to completion (~105 min, exit 0) on 2026-05-30 but emitted NO runner sentinel (never called emit_outcome), so the runner discarded the finished run as a no-result ERROR. 517c's driving loop already uses the current substrate API (generate_trajectories + select_action(candidates, ticks)) and re-runs today (smoke-passed 2026-07-11). Sole change vs 517c: import + call experiment_protocol.emit_outcome(outcome, manifest_path, run_id, dry_run) so the PASS/FAIL verdict registers. Comparator, SD-022 scheduled-injection curriculum, and acceptance criteria (C1 ARM_A events>=3/seed, C2 ARM_A writes>=2/seed, C3 ARM_B events==0, C4 ARM_B writes==0; 2/3 seed pass fraction) byte-identical to 517c. claim_ids=[MECH-302]; a contributory PASS clears the MECH-302 v3_pending gate.

items.title: INV-064 maturational sequence: E3 harm-eval quality bounded by E1/E2 differentiation (curriculum-order, measurement-only)
items.note: Measurement-only, commitment-free curriculum-order diagnostic for INV-064 (no basal-ganglia/commitment layer exercised, so a PASS/FAIL is a real verdict, not a re-derivation of the conversion ceiling). Per (seed,onset) cell: mature E1+E2.world_forward+encoder for `onset` episodes (harm_eval trained here is discarded), freeze them, replay a FIXED shared trajectory through the frozen encoder to collect (z_world,harm_target), then train a fresh harm_eval_head for a FIXED budget and read held-out R^2 + train/test gap (noise-fitted-evaluator signature) vs E1/E2 differentiation-at-freeze (z_world eff-rank, E2 forward R^2). IV=onset {2,5,11,22}; 3 seeds x 4 arms=12 cells. scheduled_external_hazard OFF (537b lesson) so harm is predictable-from-state and differentiation is the binding constraint. episodes_per_run is the MAX maturation denominator (22); the [train] ep N/M denominator varies per arm by design (M=onset). Arm cells are fingerprinted but reuse-INELIGIBLE (frozen representation depends on the shared maturation trajectory, not reproducible from config alone) -- so no separate baseline mint is queued. Scopes the E1/E2-world -> E3-harm leg of INV-064 (harm_eval reads z_world); the V4 z_self maturational-stability leg is out of scope.
